import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import { cartAPI } from '../api' export default function Cart({ onCheckout, onBack }){ const [cart, setCart] = useState(null) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) useEffect(()=>{ cartAPI.getCart().then(res=>{ setCart(res.data) setLoading(false) }).catch(()=>setLoading(false)) },[]) const handleRemoveItem = (item_id) => { cartAPI.removeItem(item_id).then(res=>{ setCart(res.data) }).catch(console.error) } const handleUpdateQuantity = (item_id, quantity) => { if(quantity <= 0) { handleRemoveItem(item_id) return } cartAPI.updateItem(item_id, quantity).then(res=>{ setCart(res.data) }).catch(console.error) } if(loading) return
🛒 Loading cart...
if(!cart || !cart.items || cart.items.length === 0) return (
🛒

Your cart is empty

) return (

🛒 Shopping Cart

{cart.items.map((item, idx) => ( ))}
Product Price Quantity Total Action
{item.product?.product_name || 'Product'}
{item.product?.brand}
 ৳{item.product?.price || 0}
handleUpdateQuantity(item.id, parseInt(e.target.value))} className="border rounded px-2 py-1 w-12 text-center" />
৳{((item.product?.price || 0) * item.quantity).toFixed(0)}

Order Summary

Subtotal: ৳{cart.total || 0}
Shipping: ৳0 (Free)
Total: ৳{cart.total || 0}
) }
